name: Elegant Crabmeat Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and flake crabmeat; combine remaining ingredients except bacon.
2. Mix well. Shape into walnut-sized balls.
3. Wrap each ball in a piece of bacon half, securing with toothpicks.
4. Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Broil under medium heat until the bacon is crisp, approximately 10 minutes, turning occasionally to brown evenly.
6. Garnish with parsley and lemon slices.
Makes approximately 2 dozen.
